comparison_vs_parallel_session_p11_park.note: Both this session's chain and parallel session's chain conclude with PARKED_SAFE_BUT_INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE_AT_IS via independent P6 IS runs (33 vs 48 trades) on the same audit-clean MNQ.c.0 CSV. The K9 mitigation hypothesis is falsified by two implementations independently.

binding_constraint_root_difference.s10_d2_binding: OOS window length (3 years) producing 53 trades < K9 on 4-market portfolio Donchian-55/20
binding_constraint_root_difference.s12_d1_binding: IS trade-density on single instrument: Donchian-15/8 on MNQ.c.0 alone produces ~7 trades/year (33 over 4.6y IS), already below K9 BEFORE reaching OOS
binding_constraint_root_difference.s12_d1_parks_earlier_in_lifecycle: s10-D2 reached OOS before K9 fired; s12-d1 fires K9 at IS itself

common_lessons: Both candidates produced clean phase pre-park lifecycles
Both fired K9 as the binding constraint
Both correctly parked without threshold loosening
Both preserved all safety-K-gates clear (no K1/K2/K4/K6 fires)
Framework discipline held in both cases: positive headline economics did not override K9 verdict semantics

different_lessons.s10_d2_lesson: OOS-window-length-binding indicates the candidate's structural risk profile was sample-size constrained at OOS
different_lessons.s12_d1_lesson: Single-instrument trade-density-binding indicates the universe choice (single MNQ.c.0) was structurally too narrow for the chosen mechanic family

k9_mitigation_hypothesis_falsification.hypothesis_at_draft: Donchian-15/8 on single MNQ.c.0 over 4.6y IS will produce 80-200 closed trades (central ~140), clearing K9=100 at central/upper estimates

lessons_learned_for_future_candidates_ca: Donchian-15/8 on a single MNQ.c.0 instrument over 4.6y produces ~7-10 trades/year (this session 7.17/y; parallel 10.4/y), NOT the 17-43 trades/year that linear-scaling-from-NQ-10y estimates suggested. The DRAFT estimate (80-200 IS trades) was substantially over-optimistic by ~2-3x.

K9-mitigation via shorter Donchian periods on a SINGLE futures instrument is structurally hard. The 4.6y IS window over a single instrument has limited signal density even at Donchian-15/8. Future candidates seeking K9 clearance on similar windows likely need either multi-instrument scope or higher-frequency mechanics (RSI / vol-targeting at shorter intervals).

C1.A / C1.D (analog: parallel REC1) structural unreachability framework was correct (and conservatively understated). Future Phase 2 candidates should apply C1.A-style proportional-scaling-vs-K9 analysis at DRAFT time before authoring SEAL.
Positive headline economics (positive sharpe + expectancy + net PnL) do NOT override K9 verdict semantics. C8 framework working as designed.
DA4=B START_CASH revision did not materially affect trade count (sizing affects contracts-per-trade, not trade-event frequency). The DR10 mitigation lever does not address K9 risk.

Two independent implementations of the same mechanic on the same data can produce different exact closed_trades counts (33 vs 48) due to cost-model / stop-timing / entry-exit conventions, but should agree on substantive verdict (both INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE here). Future Tier-N candidates may benefit from a shared reference-implementation convention to reduce this implementation-noise.
Lifecycle terminal at PARK preserves all phase-pre-park sealed artifacts for future cross-reference; archived evidence is more valuable than discarding.

lessons_md_status_for_this_turn.lessons_md_lifecycle_lessons_documented_: lessons_md preserved untouched across entire session (21 pre-existing dirty diff lines preserved); per operator's standing no-lessons-md-staging invariant, lifecycle lessons are documented in this sealed park memo only, not appended to lessons.md

p6_is_verdict_anchor.informational_economics_disclaimer: Positive headline economics (sharpe / expectancy / net PnL) do NOT override the K9 verdict. C8 weak-performance-rejection framework applies: insufficient sample size is dispositive regardless of in-sample positivity.

park_decision_driver.primary_driver: K9 fires at IS phase (closed_trades=33 < threshold=100)
park_decision_driver.secondary_driver: P2 plan IS estimate (80-200; central 140) was over-optimistic; actual ~7 trades/year on single MNQ.c.0 over 4.6y is below P2 lower bound of 80

park_status_attestation.fresh_candidate_id_with_different_donchi: fresh selection plan + fresh PLAN/DRAFT/SEAL lifecycle (NOT a _revN_ of s12-d1)

seal_method: sha256 over json.dumps(obj, sort_keys=True, separators=(",",":"), ensure_ascii=False) EXCLUDING report_seal_sha256 + seal_method
